posts.text: Gujarat Energy shares decline 1.6%; Nomura says selloff is an opportunity. Here's why

posts.author: Amit_Agarwal1
posts.community: Gujarat Energy ( Formerly Gujarat gas) Improving outlook on volumes
posts.text: Dear Ashwin, Although I have not analysed in deep the implications of this demerger exercise, On the surface it seemed fairly managed with accumplated losses of the gas transmission business being taken care of. The market is discounting Gujarat Energy ltd. very heavily almost hitting lower circuit at 290 on the listing date. I feel the demerger has now better aligned the interests of Gujarat Gas and erstwhile GSPL shareholders. I feel the pessimism is uncalled for and largely due to negative sentiments around the PSU pack as a whole. The demerger exercise was well thought out and I feel it wa…
